message:
fix: parseValue type inference falls back to string on unmarshal failure (gt-b9iky)

When parseValue inferred bool/number/JSON for values like 'true' or '42',
setting them on string fields (e.g., Agent, RoleAgents) caused unmarshal
errors. Now setNestedValue retries with the string representation when the
inferred type doesn't match the target struct field.
